pack.description: N2 reference vocabulary imported from elzup/jlpt-word-list with Simplified Chinese meanings from Nihongo ToastFish localization overlays. Chinese localization is applied from Nihongo ToastFish first-party overlays.

source.name: elzup/jlpt-word-list
source.attribution: Vocabulary data from elzup/jlpt-word-list; original deck data acknowledged by that project.
source.notes: Simplified Chinese meanings are generated from Nihongo ToastFish localization overlays. Chinese localization is first-party Nihongo ToastFish content.
